home.title: Emulation, made easy.
home.description: Concrete resources on emulators, ROMs, and community projects.

about.title: About
about.body: gusemu.org is a set of tools and resources focused on emulation fundamentals, community resources, and technical workflows.
about.body-2: The project is guided by three core principles:
about.point-safe: Prioritize safe, reliable setups that minimize user risks.
about.point-knowledge: Turn complex steps into clear, repeatable guides that empower users to build and maintain their own emulation setups.
about.point-community: Support maintainers and highlight community-driven projects.
